title: Hadoop MapReduce Counters Directory
description:
The 'counters' directory manages and organizes counters in Hadoop MapReduce, offering thread-safe operations via 'AbstractCounterGroup.java'. 'AbstractCounters.java' provides a base for managing various counter types, while 'CounterGroupFactory.java' creates different counter groups, including built-in and custom ones. 'FileSystemCounterGroup.java' and 'FrameworkCounterGroup.java' handle filesystem and framework counters, respectively. This system adheres to the Abstract Factory pattern, ensuring version control and extensibility.

TITLE: MapReduce Counter Utilities
DESCRIPTION: The 'util' directory provides utility methods for handling MapReduce counters. 'CountersStrings.java' converts counter objects to compact strings and vice versa, supporting older Hadoop versions. 'JobHistoryEventUtils.java' converts MapReduce counters to JSON and TimelineMetrics for diverse storage and retrieval. Both files use Hadoop and Jackson libraries, enhancing usability and adaptability across versions and use-cases.
